ksa_text: Ability to conduct risk analyses of systems, applications, and business processes to identify compliance-related risks and assess organizational impact.

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of language processing tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Regulatory Compliance is an edge domain for the VP Data Strategy and Operations, this ability KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.469) and conceptual alignment to include at the vp level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Regulatory Compliance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.469). External reviewers may question whether this specific ability KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the VP Data Strategy and Operations versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and SEC data governance regulations confirm regulatory compliance knowledge for governance-focused leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Regulatory Compliance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for VP Data Strategy and Operations.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance ability KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.469. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the VP Data Strategy and Operations.
